question: Will CPI rise more than 0.8% in March 2026?
reasoning: The March 2026 CPI report has already been officially released by the BLS on April 10, 2026, showing CPI increased only 0.3% for the month. Since 0.3% is significantly below the 0.8% threshold required for YES resolution, the market should resolve to NO with 100% certainty. The market is dramatically mispriced at 68% given this definitive outcome.
key_factors: Official BLS data shows March 2026 CPI increased 0.3%
Market closes April 10 - same day as data release
No possibility of revision changing outcome significantly
risks: Potential data revision (but standard error is only 0.04%)
Market may not have incorporated latest data yet
